info.title: Hive Wallet API
info.description:
**Introduction to Hive Wallet API**

The Hive Wallet API provides a comprehensive interface for managing Hive blockchain wallets, including key management, account operations, and transaction signing. This wallet is designed to interact with the Hive blockchain through a high-bandwidth, low-latency connection.

**Important Security Notes:**
- The wallet stores private keys encrypted with a password
- Always backup your wallet file and private keys securely
- Keep your wallet locked when not in use
- Never share your private keys or wallet password

**API Protocol**

All API endpoints follow the JSON-RPC 2.0 protocol. Each request is transformed from a simple JSON object to the full JSON-RPC format.

_Example:_

A body of `info` with parameters `{}` is transformed to:
```json
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"info","id":1,"params":{}}
```

**Key Features:**

- **Wallet Management:** Create, lock, unlock, and manage wallet files with encrypted key storage
- **Key Operations:** Import, export, and manage private keys with WIF format support
- **Account Operations:** Create accounts, update authorities, and manage account properties
- **Transaction Signing:** Sign and broadcast transactions to the Hive blockchain
- **Vesting Operations:** Power up/down HIVE, delegate Hive Power, and manage vesting routes
- **Transfer Operations:** Send HIVE/HBD, manage savings, and create recurrent transfers
- **Content Operations:** Post, comment, and vote on blockchain content
- **Witness Operations:** Manage witness nodes and publish price feeds
- **Market Operations:** Create and manage limit orders on the internal market
- **Proposal Operations:** Create and vote on decentralized fund proposals
- **Resource Credits:** Delegate and manage resource credits for fee-less transactions

**Wallet States:**

- **New:** Wallet has just been created with no keys
- **Locked:** Wallet is encrypted, keys are not accessible
- **Unlocked:** Wallet is decrypted, operations can be performed

**Authority Levels:**

Hive accounts have three authority levels:
- **Owner:** Full control, can change all keys (use sparingly)
- **Active:** Most operations including transfers and power operations
- **Posting:** Content operations only (posts, comments, votes)

**Broadcasting:**

Most transaction methods include a `broadcast` parameter:
- `true`: Sign and broadcast the transaction to the blockchain
- `false`: Sign the transaction but don't broadcast (returns signed transaction)

**Asset Format:**

Assets are specified as strings with amount and symbol:
- HIVE: `"100.000 HIVE"` (3 decimal places)
- HBD: `"50.000 HBD"` (3 decimal places)
- VESTS: `"1000000000 VESTS"` (6 decimal places)

**Memo Encryption:**

Memos starting with '#' are automatically encrypted using the recipient's memo key. Both sender and recipient memo private keys must be in the wallet to encrypt/decrypt.

**Connection:**

The wallet connects to a Hive node via WebSocket. Default: `ws://localhost:8090`

**Offline Mode:**

The wallet supports offline operation for signing transactions without network access.

tags.name: wallet_management
tags.description: Operations for managing the wallet file, locking/unlocking, and wallet metadata

tags.name: key_management
tags.description: Import, export, and manage private keys in WIF format

tags.name: query_operations
tags.description: Query blockchain data including accounts, blocks, witnesses, and transaction history

tags.name: account_creation
tags.description: Create new accounts with various funding and delegation options

tags.name: account_management
tags.description: Update account properties, authorities, and recovery settings

tags.name: vesting_operations
tags.description: Power up/down HIVE tokens and manage Hive Power delegations

tags.name: transfer_operations
tags.description: Transfer HIVE/HBD tokens, manage savings, and create recurrent transfers

tags.name: escrow_operations
tags.description: Create and manage escrow transactions with agent approval

tags.name: conversion_operations
tags.description: Convert between HBD and HIVE using blockchain conversion mechanisms

tags.name: witness_operations
tags.description: Manage witness operations, voting, and price feed publishing

tags.name: market_operations
tags.description: Create and manage limit orders on the HIVE:HBD internal market

tags.name: content_operations
tags.description: Post content, comment, vote, and manage social interactions

tags.name: rewards_operations
tags.description: Claim rewards and manage voting rights

tags.name: proposal_operations
tags.description: Create, update, and vote on Decentralized Hive Fund (DHF) proposals

tags.name: rc_operations
tags.description: Delegate and manage Resource Credits for fee-less transactions

tags.name: utility_operations
tags.description: Helper methods for transaction signing, serialization, and authority management

post.summary: Get list of all wallet API commands
post.description: Returns a list of all commands supported by the wallet API with brief descriptions.

schema.example: Available commands: info, list_keys, import_key, unlock, lock, set_password, ...

post.summary: Get detailed help for a specific command
post.description: Returns detailed documentation for a single API command including parameters and return types.

schema.example: Dumps all private keys owned by the wallet.

post.summary: Get wallet version and build information
post.description: Returns compile time info and client/dependencies versions.

post.summary: Check if wallet is newly created
post.description: Checks whether the wallet has just been created and has no encrypted keys.
Returns true if the wallet is currently locked and keys are not accessible.
Locks the wallet immediately. All private keys are encrypted and become inaccessible until unlocked.
Unlocks the wallet using the provided password. Private keys become accessible for signing operations.
Sets a new password for the wallet. Can only be called on a new wallet that hasn't been unlocked yet.
Locks the wallet if unlocked, saves it to disk, and exits the wallet application.
Loads a specified wallet file from disk. If no filename is provided, loads the default wallet.
Saves the current wallet to disk. Optionally specify a different filename.
Imports a WIF (Wallet Import Format) private key into the wallet. The wallet must be unlocked.
Imports multiple WIF private keys into the wallet. The wallet must be unlocked.
Suggests a safe brain key to use for generating deterministic private keys. Returns the brain key, WIF private key, and corresponding public key.
Returns all public keys and their corresponding WIF private keys stored in the wallet. The wallet must be unlocked.

post.summary: Get private key for public key
post.description: Returns the WIF private key corresponding to a public key. The wallet must be unlocked.
Derives a private key from account name, role (owner/active/posting/memo), and password. Returns both public and WIF private key.
Normalizes a brain key by uppercasing ASCII characters and collapsing spaces.
Returns info about current blockchain state including dynamic global properties.
Lists all accounts for which the wallet has private keys. The wallet must be unlocked.
Lists all accounts registered on the blockchain, starting from lowerbound with pagination.
Lists all registered witnesses on the blockchain with pagination.
Returns detailed information about a specific witness.
Returns detailed information about a specific account.
Returns detailed information about multiple accounts.
Returns block information including all transactions and operations for the specified block number.
Returns all operations contained in a specified block. Can filter to show only virtual operations.
Returns the current price feed history object.
Returns all active HBD to HIVE conversion requests for an account.
Returns all active collateralized HIVE to HBD conversion requests for an account.
Returns a history of all operations for a given account with pagination.
Returns all vesting withdraw routes for an account (incoming, outgoing, or all).
Returns all recurrent transfers initiated by an account.
Claims a subsidized account creation token. This operation blocks until the transaction is confirmed.
Claims a subsidized account creation token without waiting for confirmation.
Creates a new account with automatically generated owner, active, posting, and memo keys. The wallet must have the creator's active key.
Creates a new account with specified public keys for all authorities. The resulting account may not be controllable by this wallet.

schema.description: Parameters: [creator, new_account_name, json_meta, owner, active, posting, memo, broadcast]

post.description: Creates a new account with provided keys and an initial HIVE/HBD transfer.

schema.description: Parameters: [creator, new_account_name, hive_amount, hbd_amount, json_meta, owner, active, posting, memo, broadcast]

post.description: Creates a new account with auto-generated keys, HIVE fee, and delegated VESTS.

schema.description: Parameters: [creator, hive_fee, delegated_vests, new_account_name, json_meta, broadcast]

post.summary: Create account with keys and delegation
post.description: Creates a new account with provided keys, HIVE fee, and delegated VESTS.

schema.description: Parameters: [creator, hive_fee, delegated_vests, new_account_name, json_meta, owner, active, posting, memo, broadcast]

post.description: Updates all account authority keys (owner, active, posting, memo) and JSON metadata.

schema.description: Parameters: [account_name, json_meta, owner, active, posting, memo, broadcast]

post.description: Adds, updates, or removes a public key from an authority (owner, active, or posting). Set weight to 0 to remove.
Adds, updates, or removes an account from an authority. Set weight to 0 to remove.
Updates the weight threshold required for an authority to be valid.
Updates only the JSON metadata field of an account.
Updates only the memo key of an account.
Delegates VESTS (Hive Power) to another account. This operation waits for confirmation.
Delegates VESTS without waiting for confirmation.
Delegates VESTS and transfers HIVE with optional memo in a single transaction.

schema.description: Parameters: [delegator, delegatee, vesting_shares, transfer_amount, transfer_memo, broadcast]

post.description: Delegates VESTS and transfers HIVE without waiting for confirmation.

schema.description: Parameters: [delegator, delegatee, vesting_shares, transfer_amount, transfer_memo, broadcast]

post.description: Updates witness URL, signing key, and chain properties. Set signing key to empty string to disable witness.
Sets another account as a proxy for witness/proposal voting. Set to empty string to remove proxy.
Votes for or removes vote from a witness. Maximum 30 witness votes per account.
Follows or unfollows an account. Set 'what' to types: blog, posts, comments, votes, ignore.
Transfers HIVE or HBD to another account. Memo starting with '#' will be encrypted.
Transfers HIVE or HBD without waiting for confirmation.
Transfers funds to escrow with an agent who can approve or dispute the transfer.

schema.description: Parameters: [from, to, agent, escrow_id, hbd_amount, hive_amount, fee, ratification_deadline, escrow_expiration, json_meta, broadcast]

post.description: Approves an escrow transfer. Must be called by 'to' or 'agent'.

schema.description: Parameters: [from, to, agent, who, escrow_id, approve, broadcast]

post.description: Raises a dispute on an escrow transfer. Can be called by 'from' or 'to'.

schema.description: Parameters: [from, to, agent, who, escrow_id, broadcast]

post.description: Releases funds from escrow to the receiver. Agent decides distribution after dispute.

schema.description: Parameters: [from, to, agent, who, receiver, escrow_id, hbd_amount, hive_amount, broadcast]

post.description: Transfers HIVE to vesting (powers up). This operation waits for confirmation.
Transfers HIVE to vesting without waiting for confirmation.
Sets up a vesting withdrawal (power down) that executes over 13 weeks. Set amount to 0 to cancel.
Sets a route for vesting withdrawals to automatically go to another account. Percent is in hundredths (100 = 1%).
Converts HBD to HIVE using the median price feed. Takes 3.5 days to complete.

post.summary: Convert HIVE to HBD with collateral
post.description: Converts HIVE to HBD instantly (with 5% extra collateral) plus delayed conversion. Collateral returns after 3.5 days.
Estimates the amount of HIVE collateral needed to get a specific amount of HBD.
Publishes a price feed for the HBD:HIVE exchange rate. Witnesses only.
Returns the current order book for the HIVE:HBD market.
Returns all open limit orders for an account.
Creates a limit order on the internal HIVE:HBD market. Order ID must be unique per account.

schema.description: Parameters: [owner, order_id, amount_to_sell, min_to_receive, fill_or_kill, expiration_sec, broadcast]

post.description: Cancels an existing limit order by order ID.
Posts a new article/comment or updates existing content. Empty parent_author creates a top-level post.

schema.description: Parameters: [author, permlink, parent_author, parent_permlink, title, body, json, broadcast]

post.description: Votes on a post or comment. Weight range: -100 (downvote) to 100 (upvote). 0 removes vote.
Sets the expiration time for future transactions in seconds from now.
Creates an account recovery request to recover a compromised account.
Recovers an account using both the recent owner authority and a new owner authority.
Changes the account designated as the recovery account. Takes effect after 30 days.
Returns the owner authority history for an account.
Transfers HIVE or HBD to savings. Funds are immediately moved to savings.
Transfers HIVE or HBD from savings. Funds become available after 72 hours.

schema.description: Parameters: [from, request_id, to, amount, memo, broadcast]

post.description: Cancels a pending transfer from savings before the 72-hour waiting period completes.
Encrypts a memo if it starts with '#' using the sender and recipient memo keys.
Decrypts an encrypted memo if the wallet has the appropriate keys.
Permanently declines voting rights for an account. Irreversible after confirmation.
Claims pending HIVE, HBD, and VESTS rewards from content curation and authoring.
Creates a recurrent transfer that executes automatically at fixed intervals.

schema.description: Parameters: [from, to, amount, memo, recurrence, executions, broadcast]

post.description: Creates a recurrent transfer with a specific pair ID for managing multiple recurrent transfers.

schema.description: Parameters: [from, to, amount, memo, recurrence, executions, pair_id, broadcast]

post.description: Returns a default-constructed operation object for the specified operation type (e.g., 'transfer_operation').
Converts a signed transaction to binary hex string format.
Signs a transaction with the appropriate keys from the wallet.
Returns the list of witnesses currently producing blocks.
Returns a transaction by its transaction ID.
Explicitly specifies which authority (owner/active/posting) to use for signing operations.
Returns to automatic authority detection for signing operations.
Creates a Decentralized Hive Fund (DHF) proposal for funding.

schema.description: Parameters: [creator, receiver, start_date, end_date, daily_pay, subject, permlink, broadcast]

post.description: Updates an existing DHF proposal's parameters.

schema.description: Parameters: [proposal_id, creator, daily_pay, subject, permlink, end_date, broadcast]

post.description: Votes for or against one or more DHF proposals.
Lists DHF proposals with filtering and sorting options.
Finds DHF proposals by their proposal IDs.
Lists votes on DHF proposals with filtering options.
Removes one or more DHF proposals by their IDs.
Delegates resource credits (RC) to other accounts for fee-less transactions.
Retrieves resource credit information for specified accounts.
Lists resource credit accounts with pagination.
Lists resource credit direct delegations with pagination.

conversion_date.description: The date when the conversion will take place.

owner.description: The name of the account that owns the request.

conversion_date.description: The date when the conversion will take place.

owner.description: The name of the account that owns the request.

info_response.description: Information about the current state of the blockchain and network

head_block_id.description: The ID of the current head block

head_block_age.description: Human-readable age of the head block (e.g., '5 seconds old')

current_witness.description: Name of the current block producer

num_pow_witnesses.description: Number of proof of work witnesses

total_vesting_fund_hive.description: Total HIVE in the vesting fund

hbd_interest_rate.description: HBD interest rate in basis points (e.g., 1000 = 10%)

required_actions_partition_percent.description: Percentage of block reserved for required actions

post_reward_fund.description: Post reward fund information (null for hardforks before 0.17)

client_version.description: Wallet client version from git revision

hive_revision.description: Git commit SHA of the Hive codebase

hive_revision_age.description: Human-readable age of the Hive git revision

fc_revision.description: Git commit SHA of the FC library

fc_revision_age.description: Human-readable age of the FC git revision

compile_date.description: Date and time when the wallet was compiled

server_url.description: WebSocket URL of connected server (if online)

server.description: Error message if server information could not be retrieved (offline mode)
server.example: Could not retrieve server version information

about_response.description: Version and build information for the wallet client and connected server

api_account_object.description: Account object with all account details

api_dynamic_global_property_object.description: Dynamic global properties of the blockchain
